prompt: In System Settings > General > Login Items, in the 'Allow in the Background' list, disable every non-essential entry. Define essential = Apple-signed (Bundle Identifier starts with `com.apple.`). Setup adds a sentinel non-Apple entry that the agent must remove or disable. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings bulk_disable_startup'` (removes login items whose path isn't under /System or /Library). The eval lists Login Items via osascript and expects the sentinel to be gone (or all non-Apple entries to be gone).
